---
comments: false
---

<div class="bio-shell">

<div class="bio-card-research">

<a class="link-btn" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=grF2Zc4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-google"></i>
    <span class="label">Google Scholar</span>
  </span>
</a>

## Publications

1.  **Luna, J**. , Jaynes, J. , Xu, H. , Wong, WK. Orthogonal array composite designs for drug combination experiments with applications for tuberculosis. [Statistics in Medicine](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/sim.9423). 2022; 1- 18
<a class="inline-btn" href="/docs/publications/Orthogonal array composite designs for drug combination experiments.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
</a>
<button class="inline-btn" onclick="toggleBibtex('bibtex-oacd')">
  <i class="bi bi-quote"></i> BibTeX
</button>

<div id="bibtex-oacd" class="bibtex-box">
<div class="bibtex-header">
  <span>BibTeX</span>
  <button class="bibtex-copy" onclick="copyBibtex('bibtex-oacd')">
    <i class="bi bi-clipboard"></i>
    <span class="copy-label">Copy</span>
  </button>
</div>
<pre>
@article{luna2022orthogonal,
  title={Orthogonal array composite designs for drug combination experiments with applications for tuberculosis},
  author={Luna, Jose and Jaynes, Jessica and Xu, Hongquan and Wong, Weng Kee},
  journal={Statistics in medicine},
  volume={41},
  number={17},
  pages={3380--3397},
  year={2022},
  publisher={Wiley Online Library}
}
</pre>
</div>



## Software


1. [ggDoE](https://ggdoe.netlify.app/index.html): Create commonly used graphs in Design of Experiments with *ggplot2*
2. [pyLHD](https://pylhd.netlify.app): Latin Hypercube Designs for Python



<script>
function toggleBibtex(id){
  const box = document.getElementById(id);
  box.classList.toggle("show");
}

function copyBibtex(id){

  const text = document.querySelector(`#${id} pre`).innerText;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
  const label = document.querySelector(`#${id} .copy-label`);
  label.innerText = "Copied!";

  setTimeout(() => {
    label.innerText = "Copy";
  }, 1500);
}
</script>
